{{ row.wins }}
How ranking works
×
Win 10 matches to level up to the next tier. Your tier is shared across the whole ranked ladder — there's only one Overall Rating.
{{ tr.tierLabel }}
top {{ tr.pct }}% of players
Higher ranks play differently
Gold and up: matchmaking weighs skill over queue speed, so games take a little longer to find.
Diamond and up: one loss can drop you a full tier, so every match counts.
Aurelune is a live leaderboard, not a checkpoint — you can be overtaken any time someone below you wins.

Scoring rules

View full scoring rules
Settings
×
Quit match
Menu → Create/Join Lobby → Start → Match. In-match: tap the opponent chip or the board tabs to switch to Alex's read-only board; the dashed pill is a dev-only trigger for the "opponent made a move" toast.
Plenus — board UI, 3 layout options
1a Slim header · dice strip below board

Joker: colour
Joker: number

Confirm
Settings
×
Sound
Music
Vibration
Quit match
Tap a colour die + a number die to see matching cells glow (dashed outline). Tap glowing cells to mark them (pending, blue ring), then Confirm to lock them in (dimmed + counted) or Pass to discard the selection. Joker chips let you skip a condition at the cost of a joker.
